title: Sophie Pardehpoosh
text: My name is Sophie Pardehpoosh and I am a fourth-year environmental studies student at UC Santa Barbara. I am currently taking ENV 193DS in which I am building my statistical knowledge, and learning how to use R. To demonstrate my coding skills, I have made this website.
